description_long: This ornate sconce features a central, vase-shaped body in green and teal, suspended from a gold chain and ceiling mount. Six arms radiate outward, each supporting a lampshade with a tan, pleated fabric appearance and decorative trim. The arms are elegantly curved in a lavender hue, adorned with hanging purple beads and teardrop-shaped pendants, adding a touch of sophistication. The fixture's base and connecting elements are accented in pastel blue, purple, and gold, contributing to its vintage charm. The overall design is symmetrical, with each arm and shade evenly spaced around the central body. The sconce combines both functional lighting and decorative appeal, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors.
description: A vintage-style, multi-arm sconce with six tan fabric lampshades, ornate curved arms, and hanging purple bead decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six lampshades, the central vase-shaped body, and symmetrical arrangement of arms and beads.
description_view_1: Rear angled view with five lampshades visible, highlighting the curvature of the arms and the back of the central body.
description_view_2: Similar to the front, this view displays the full symmetry of the sconce, with all lampshades and decorative elements clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear angled view mirroring view 1, showing five lampshades and the detailed arm structure from the opposite side.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and ornate, this fixture features curved arms, pleated fabric shades, and hanging bead decorations, evoking a classic, elegant style with subtle pastel accents.
